title: Phil Foden ‘not a guarantee’ to make England World Cup squad, says Tuchel
description: The head coach said of the midfielder, who failed to impress in the friendlies against Uruguay and Japan: ‘He was excellent in camp but struggles on the pitch’
content:
Thomas Tuchel says Phil Foden is not assured of a place in his England squad for the World Cup finals in the summer after watching him struggle in the Wembley friendlies against Uruguay and Japan.
Tuchel has appeared unconvinced by Foden since taking... [1989 chars]

title: Scott Mills releases statement after BBC sacking as he addresses police investigation
description: The radio DJ thanked people who had reached out "with kindness" - adding that his departure from the BBC has led to "rumour and speculation".
content:
Scott Mills has released a statement after his sacking by the BBC as he addressed the police investigation into him.

title: SpaceX confidentially files to go public at $1.75tn, reports say
description: Elon Musk’s rocket company could go public as early as June, Bloomberg reports
content: SpaceX has confidentially filed for an initial public offering on the US stock market, according to reports from Bloomberg and the Wall Street Journal. The IPO is set to be one of the most closely watched and highly valued listings in market history.... [2742 chars]

title: Thomas Tuchel throws Phil Foden’s World Cup place into doubt
description: England head coach admits midfielder is not guaranteed a spot after ‘struggles’; Plus, City man not making the squad does not feel right
content:
Thomas Tuchel has cast doubt over picking Phil Foden for the World Cup after his “struggles” in the last two friendlies.
Foden started against both Uruguay and Japan and, the England head coach admitted, failed to make a “full impact”.
